services.label: WHAT WE OFFER
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything a wholesaler or retailer needs — in one place.
services.s1body: Browse hundreds of food and cleaning products from verified suppliers at wholesale prices — with direct ordering and no middlemen.
services.s2body: Exclusive opportunities on factory overstock and clearance batches at highly competitive prices — ideal for traders looking for higher margins.
services.s3body: We connect you directly with factories and suppliers in Europe, Turkey, and the Middle East for factory-price imports or to export your products abroad.
services.s4body: We link wholesalers and retailers with suppliers for regular supply contracts, with tailored offers and fixed pricing to keep your operations running smoothly.

meta.title: Hawiyah | Saudi Arabia's Wholesale Food Supply Marketplace
meta.description: Hawiyah connects manufacturers and suppliers directly with wholesalers, retailers, hypermarkets, and distributors across Saudi Arabia. Factory prices, daily supply, and clearance deals — all in one place.
